gameTitle: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky SC

achievements.title: Just So You Know...
achievements.description: Achievements will NOT unlock on Easy difficulty! Also, battle-related achievements will NOT unlock if you lower the difficulty after falling in battle!
